items.line_en: In today's society, social media has become a powerful and popular tool in people's daily life. Due to its wide coverage, social media has millions and millions users in any part of the world.

coach.say: In today's society, social media has become a powerful and popular tool in people's daily life. Due to its wide coverage, social media has millions and millions users in any part of the world.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In today's society, / social media has become a powerful and popular tool in people's daily life. / Due to its wide coverage, / social media has millions and millions users in any part of the world.

items.line_en: The biggest and most useful function is that we can use them to chat and keep in touch with others.

coach.say: The biggest and most useful function is that we can use them to chat and keep in touch with others.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The biggest and most useful function is that we can use them to chat and / keep in touch with others.

items.line_en: We can post something that we want to share, such as our feelings, things that are going to happen, or had already happened. Of course, we can view others moments too, to find something funny, to know what happened around you.

coach.say: We can post something that we want to share, such as our feelings, things that are going to happen, or had already happened. Of course, we can view others moments too, to find something funny, to know what happened around you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We can post something that we want to share, such as our feelings, / things that are going to happen, or had already happened. Of course, we can view others moments too, to find something funny, to know what happened around you.

items.line_en: In the last few years, social media has greatly changed the world of marketing.

coach.say: In the last few years, social media has greatly changed the world of marketing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In the last few years, / social media has greatly changed the world of marketing.

items.line_en: Enterprise's use social media to showcase their brands, build a good relationship with customer and drawing new sales.

coach.say: Enterprise's use social media to showcase their brands, build a good relationship with customer and drawing new sales.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Enterprise's use social media to showcase their brands, / build a good relationship with customer and drawing new sales.

items.line_en: Social media makes life convenient, lets people get a reef to each other. It certainly plays a great role for the success of each individual.

coach.say: Social media makes life convenient, lets people get a reef to each other. It certainly plays a great role for the success of each individual.
